kw.name: Register Keyword To Run On Failure
kw.msg: Capture Screenshot On Failure will be run on failure.
kw.doc: Sets the keyword to be executed when an AppiumLibrary keyword fails.

test.name: TC_M1.2_002 - Verify That The User Can Initiate The Signup Process

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Close Application
Run Keyword And Return Status
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into the log.
Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Log
kw.msg: Could not capture screenshot — no active Appium session
kw.arg: Could not capture screenshot — no active Appium session
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.arg: Could not capture screenshot — no active Appium session
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.
Closes the current application and the webdriver session.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Open Application
kw.doc: Opens a new application to the given Appium server. Capabilities of appium server, Android and iOS, Please check https://appium.io/docs/en/2.19/guides/caps/ | *Option* | *Man.* | *Description* | | remote_url | Yes | Appium server url | | alias | No | alias |

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Run
kw.msg: Running command 'adb -s emulator-5554 shell am force-stop com.higala.ruralbanksanantonioitg 2>&1'.
kw.doc: _This keyword is considered deprecated. Use the [http://robotframework.org/robotframework/latest/libraries/Process.html| Process] library instead._

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Activate Application
kw.doc: Activates the application if it is not running or is running in the background.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.msg: xpath criteria: //*[@content-desc='Sign in'] xpath criteria: //*[@content-desc='Sign in']
kw.doc: Waits until the element specified by the ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Clicks the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element specified by the ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Clicks the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.msg: xpath criteria: //android.widget.TextView[@text='OTP Verification'] xpath criteria: //android.widget.TextView[@text='OTP Verification']
kw.doc: Waits until the element specified by the ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Expect Element
kw.doc: Verifies that the element with the given ``locator`` has the desired ``state`` (visible, not visible, enabled, disabled.)

test.doc:
Verify user can tap Get Started, enter a valid unregistered email, tap Next, and be redirected to the OTP Verification screen. A system OTP is sent to the registered email.
Pre-conditions: Mobile app is launched. AC_SIGNUP_EMAIL_1 is not registered.

test.name: TC_M1.2_003 - Verify That The User Can Complete OTP Verification

kw.name: Enter OTP Into Boxes
Click Element
Run Keyword And Return Status
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.msg: WebDriverException: Message: 'GET /screenshot' cannot be proxied to UiAutomator2 server because the instrumentation process is not running (probably crashed). kw.name: Expect Element
kw.doc: Verifies that the element with the given ``locator`` has the desired ``state`` (visible, not visible, enabled, disabled.)

test.doc:
Verify user can enter the magic OTP and be allowed to proceed to the next step: Policy Agreement screen.
Pre-conditions: App launched. AC_SIGNUP_EMAIL_2 is not registered. NOTE: Magic OTP = 123456 (test environment only).
test.status: WebDriverException: Message: Could not proxy command to the remote server. Original error: socket hang up Stacktrace: UnknownError: Could not proxy command to the remote server. Original error: socket hang up at ProxyRequestError.getActualError (/usr/local/lib/node_modules/appium/node_modules/@appium/base-driver/build/lib/protocol/errors.js:692:16) at UIA2Proxy.command (/usr/local/lib/node_modules/appium/node_modules/@appium/base-driver/build/lib/jsonwp-proxy/proxy.js:308:27) at process.processTicksAndRejections (node:internal/process/task_queues:103:5) at async AndroidUiautomator2Driver.click (/Users/jocelynjavier/.appium/node_modules/appium-uiautomator2-driver/build/lib/commands/element.js:121:5)

test.name: TC_M1.2_004 - Verify That The User Can Review And Agree To Bank Policies
test.doc:
Verify user can view Terms & Conditions and Data Privacy Policy, tick both checkboxes, and tap Next to proceed to the Personal Details screen.
Pre-conditions: App launched. AC_POLICY_EMAIL is not registered. NOTE: T&C and Privacy modal close button locator — verify with Appium Inspector if this fails.
test.status: Failure occurred and exit-on-failure mode is in use.

test.name: TC_M1.2_005 - Verify That User Can Fill Up Personal Details Page
test.doc:
Verify user can enter First Name, Middle Name (optional), Last Name, Suffix (optional), Gender, Date of Birth, and mobile number, then proceed to Verify Identity screen.
Pre-conditions: App launched. AC_PERSONAL_EMAIL is not registered. NOTE: DOB uses a NumberPicker dialog — verify picker column order (Month/Day/Year) with Appium Inspector. NOTE: If hint-based locators fail for name fields, switch to positional (//android.widget.EditText)[N].
test.status: Failure occurred and exit-on-failure mode is in use.

test.name: TC_M1.2_006 - Verify That The User Can Verify Identity Via Veriff
test.doc:
Verify user can select ID type, enter ID number and expiry date, tap Proceed to Veriff, and complete the KYC process (photo of ID + selfie).
Pre-conditions: User is on the Verify Your Identity screen (reached via TC_M1.2_005 flow). NOTE: Veriff runs inside a Chrome WebView at alchemy.veriff.com. Chrome WebRTC camera API does NOT work with Android emulator virtual camera. This test REQUIRES a physical Android device for camera capture. NOTE: On sandbox/test env, tapping the capture button twice typically accepts the image without valid scanning — verify with QA before automating.
test.status: Failure occurred and exit-on-failure mode is in use.

test.name: TC_M1.2_007 - Verify That The User Can Successfully Input Profile Information
test.doc:
Verify user can select Nationality, Region/Province/City of Birth, select Civil Status, then proceed to Mother's Maiden Name page.
Pre-conditions: AC_HAPPY_PV_EMAIL has Veriff bypass — OTP resumes at Profile screen. Independent test (no longer chained from 006). Uses Navigate To Profile Screen keyword.
test.status: Failure occurred and exit-on-failure mode is in use.

errors.msg: Could not capture screenshot — no active Appium session
Could not capture screenshot — no active Appium session
